items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 4: Conversation 4. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I drink coffee in the morning.
• I eat cheese in the afternoon.
• I work with my father.
• I play the piano.

items.text: I drink coffee in the morning.

items.prompt: I don’t drink coffee in the morning, but I drink tea.
options: I drink coffee in the morning 3.
You drink coffee in the morning.
morning the in coffee drink I.
I drink coffee in the morning.

items.text: I eat cheese in the afternoon.

items.prompt: I don’t eat cheese in the afternoon, but I eat bread and ham.
options: afternoon the in cheese eat I.
I drink cheese in the afternoon.
You eat cheese in the afternoon.
I eat cheese in the afternoon.

items.prompt: I don’t work with my father, but I work with my brother.

items.answer: 4- I work with my friend at school
